description: Add pub fn all_tasks_resolved(&self) -> bool to TrackMetadata
Returns true if every task has status done or skipped
sections.title: Domain layer: task completion check

description: In apps/cli/src/commands/pr.rs push(), after resolve_branch_context() and before repo.push_branch()
Read metadata.json via FsTrackStore or direct decode
If false: print [BLOCKED] with list of unresolved task IDs and statuses, return ExitCode::FAILURE
Skip guard entirely when branch starts with plan/ (planning-only branches have no code tasks)
sections.title: CLI guard in pr push

description: Domain unit test: all_tasks_resolved returns false with mixed states, true with all done/skipped
CLI integration test: push() returns FAILURE when tasks are unresolved
CLI integration test: push() skips guard on plan/ branches (AC3)
sections.title: Tests

summary: Add a guard to sotp pr push that blocks when the track has unresolved tasks (not done/skipped).
Prevents the workflow mistake of pushing before task state transitions, which forces main-branch direct commits post-merge.
Enforces by mechanism (domain guard), not by memory or prompt instructions.

tasks.description: Domain: add all_tasks_resolved() method to TrackMetadata
CLI: add task completion guard to sotp pr push before git push
Tests: guard blocks on unresolved tasks, passes on all done/skipped

title: Block PR push when track has unresolved tasks
